page: Microsoft Azure EC2eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEDV5 server family. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance utilizes the x86_64 CPU architecture and provides 2 dedicated vCPUs. The hardware configuration delivers 16.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

For storage requirements, the server is equipped with 48 GB of local disk storage and is Premium Storage capable, enabling integration with high-performance storage volumes. The instance does not feature any integrated graphics processing units and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This resource profile is structured for memory-intensive workloads that require a relatively small CPU footprint. The combination of dedicated compute cores, a high memory-to-vCPU ratio, and local storage makes this server suitable for small-scale databases, in-memory caching layers, and lightweight enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure EC2eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEDV5 server family. Powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features an x86_64 architecture with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The server is equipped with 48 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage configurations for enhanced disk performance. It does not include integrated graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware configuration is designed for memory-sensitive applications that do not require high CPU core counts, making it suitable for small-scale databases, in-memory caching, and lightweight enterprise workloads.
